rolePermissions.title: Role Permissions
rolePermissions.description: Customize permissions for each role in your venue

permissionSets.description: Create reusable permission bundles and assign them to staff members
permissionSets.emptyHint: Create your first set to customize permissions beyond roles
permissionSets.deleteConfirmMessage: "{{name}}" will be deleted. {{count}} staff member(s) will revert to their role-based permissions.
permissionSets.fallbackWarning: {{count}} staff member(s) reverted to role-based permissions
permissionSets.presetHint: Customize the permission set from these levels based on your business needs.

standard.title: Standard
standard.description: Basic permissions to complete transactions at the POS
standard.examples: Examples: cashiers, floor staff, and service providers

enhanced.title: Enhanced
enhanced.description: Advanced permissions, e.g., cancel a sale, update inventory, and manage shifts
enhanced.examples: Examples: lead cashiers, managers, shift leads, and front desk staff

complete.title: Complete
complete.description: All permissions except bank transfer and account management
complete.examples: Examples: owners, co-owners, administrators, and general managers

templates.title: Quick Presets
templates.description: Select a role template to quickly apply a permission set
templates.confirmApplyMessage: This will replace all current permissions with the {{role}} default permissions. Any unsaved changes will be lost.

superCategories.staffCustomersDesc: Time tracking, reports, and customer lookup

rolePermissions.noResultsFound: No permissions found matching your search
rolePermissions.criticalPermissionTooltip: This is a critical permission that cannot be removed from your own role to prevent self-lockout
rolePermissions.noAccessDesc: You don't have permission to manage role permissions. Contact your administrator.
rolePermissions.infoAlert: Changes to role permissions will affect all users with that role. Individual staff members can have custom permissions in Team Management.
rolePermissions.selectRoleDesc: Choose a role to customize permissions
rolePermissions.customPermissionsDesc: Custom permissions are active for this role
rolePermissions.defaultPermissionsDesc: Using default permissions for this role
rolePermissions.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you continue. Do you want to discard these changes?
rolePermissions.wildcardActive: This role has wildcard permissions (*:*) granting full access to all features.
rolePermissions.modifyingOwnRole: You are modifying permissions for your own role. Critical permissions cannot be removed to prevent self-lockout.
rolePermissions.legendCritical: Critical permission (cannot be removed from own role)
rolePermissions.updateSuccessDesc: Permissions for {{role}} have been successfully updated.
rolePermissions.updateError: Failed to update permissions. Please try again.
rolePermissions.revertSuccessDesc: Permissions for {{role}} have been reverted to defaults.
rolePermissions.revertError: Failed to revert permissions. Please try again.
rolePermissions.confirmRevertMessage: This will restore the default permissions for this role and remove any customizations. This action cannot be undone.

categoryDescriptions.home: Access the main dashboard with business metrics and summary.
categoryDescriptions.analytics: View and export analytics and performance reports.
categoryDescriptions.settlements: Manage settlements, cash register cuts, and balances.
categoryDescriptions.reports: Access detailed sales and operations reports.
categoryDescriptions.menu: Create, edit, and delete menu products and categories.
categoryDescriptions.payments: Process payments, refunds, and view transactions.
categoryDescriptions.products: Manage products for Scan & Go and catalog.
categoryDescriptions.shifts: Open, close, and manage staff shifts.
categoryDescriptions.tpv: Configure and manage point of sale terminals.
categoryDescriptions.inventory: Control stock levels, ingredients, and inventory movements.
categoryDescriptions.reviews: View and respond to customer reviews.
categoryDescriptions.teams: Invite, edit roles, and manage team members.
categoryDescriptions.tables: Configure tables, zones, and venue layout.
categoryDescriptions.venues: Configure venue information, hours, and tax details.
categoryDescriptions.billing: View and manage subscriptions, payment methods, and billing.
categoryDescriptions.customers: View, create, and manage customer profiles.
categoryDescriptions.customer_groups: Create and manage customer groups for segmentation.
categoryDescriptions.loyalty: Configure and manage loyalty programs and points.
categoryDescriptions.discounts: Create and manage discounts and promotions.
categoryDescriptions.coupons: Create, edit, and manage discount coupons.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_settings: Configure general point of sale terminal options.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_terminal: Configure devices, printers, and terminal peripherals.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_orders: Advanced order operations from the terminal.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_payments: Advanced payment operations from the terminal.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_shifts: Manage shifts directly from the terminal.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_tables: Manage tables and assignments from the terminal.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_customers: Search and manage customers from the terminal.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_time_entries: Track staff clock-in and clock-out times.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_reports: View sales and performance reports from the terminal.
categoryDescriptions.tpv_products: Manage products for quick scanning (Scan & Go).
categoryDescriptions.tpv_factory_reset: Reset the terminal to factory settings. Critical and irreversible action.

permissionDescriptions.tpv_command: Enables the specific remote command options below.
permissionDescriptions.tpv_command_wipe: Permanently deletes all data on the device. This action cannot be undone.
permissionDescriptions.tpv_command_shutdown: The device will need to be physically powered on to use again.
permissionDescriptions.tpv-factory-reset_execute: Resets the device to its original factory settings. All local data will be lost.
permissionDescriptions.payments_refund: Allows processing partial or full refunds on completed transactions.
permissionDescriptions.inventory_adjust: Allows manual quantity adjustments without creating a purchase order.
permissionDescriptions.customers_settle-balance: Allows marking pending accounts receivable balances as paid.
permissionDescriptions.commissions_payout: Allows processing approved commission payments to employees.
permissionDescriptions.commissions_view_own: Employees can view their own commissions and sales goals.
permissionDescriptions.tpv-payments_pay-later: Allows the customer to receive their order without paying. Creates an account receivable.
permissionDescriptions.tpv-kiosk_enable: Activates self-service mode for customers to place orders directly.
permissionDescriptions.tpv-orders_comp: Only available on the POS app.
permissionDescriptions.tpv-orders_void: Only available on the POS app.
permissionDescriptions.tpv-orders_discount: Only available on the POS app.
permissionDescriptions.settings_manage: Includes roles, permissions, integrations, and general venue settings.
permissionDescriptions.teams_invite: Sends an email invitation to join the venue's team.
permissionDescriptions.loyalty_redeem: Allows redeeming accumulated points at checkout.
permissionDescriptions.shifts_close: Generates the cash register cut with the shift's sales summary.

roleDisplayNames.infoAlert: Customize how role names appear in your venue. This only affects the display name, not the actual permissions.
roleDisplayNames.noChangesDesc: There are no changes to save.
roleDisplayNames.saveSuccessDesc: Role display names have been updated.
roleDisplayNames.resetSuccessDesc: All role names have been reset to defaults.
roleDisplayNames.resetConfirmMessage: This will reset all role display names, descriptions, and colors to their defaults. This action cannot be undone.
